generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving identifier and type errors reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid helper declarations within existing AGREE clauses.
Ensure AGREE contracts are contained within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or `eq` helpers declared in the same annex.
Ensure helper declarations match the expected expression types (e.g., bool for comparison expressions).
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on correcting existing contract expressions.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
